scripts.dev: concurrently "pnpm --filter dashboard dev" "pnpm --filter backend dev" "pnpm --filter example-service dev" "pnpm --filter example-service-py dev"
scripts.test:alpha:ui:all: pnpm --filter dashboard exec playwright test e2e/alpha-project-setup-and-run.spec.ts e2e/alpha-schedule-lifecycle.spec.ts e2e/alpha-trace-drilldown.spec.ts
scripts.test:alpha:backend: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_alpha_scheduler_recovery.py tests/test_alpha_project_isolation.py tests/test_runtime_config.py tests/test_agent_task_runtime.py tests/test_task_dependency_installer.py -q
